nodes.context: Tokyo-based yakuza gang, formerly enemies of Yamaguchi-gumi.
Yakuza group; Kudo was its 7th socho.
Major yakuza syndicate; became affiliate of Kokusui-kai after sakazuki ceremony.
Rival yakuza gang to Kokusui-kai, involved in shootings and retaliations.

edges.evidence_quote: As a result of the ritual, the Kokusui-kai became an affiliate of their former enemies, the Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.context: Kokusui-kai became an affiliate of Yamaguchi-gumi after the sakazuki ceremony.

edges.evidence_quote: The shootings ended with an agreement between the Kokusui-kai and Yamaguchi-gumi to stop fighting on 8 February.
edges.context: Kokusui-kai and Yamaguchi-gumi agreed to stop fighting, indicating a truce.

edges.evidence_quote: The suicide followed a rash of shootings and retaliations between Kokusui-kai and a rival gang, Sumiyoshi-kai, over gang territory, including the shooting death of Sumiyoshi-kai's boss.
edges.context: Kokusui-kai and Sumiyoshi-kai were engaged in violent conflict over territory.
